name: Manufacturing
description: Smart factory solutions for high-precision quality control and predictive maintenance.
problem: Unplanned downtime and manual quality inspection lead to significant revenue loss and customer dissatisfaction in high-speed production lines.
how_it_works: We deploy edge AI models that monitor vibration, sound, and visual data in real-time to predict failures before they happen and detect defects with 99.9% accuracy.
expectations: 30% reduction in maintenance costs, 60% reduction in unplanned downtime, and a near-zero escape rate for production defects.

name: Agriculture
description: Precision farming tools for crop health monitoring and yield optimization.
problem: Variable field conditions and late detection of pest or nutrient issues cause 10-15% annual yield loss for large-scale farming operations.
how_it_works: Combining satellite imagery, drone data, and ground sensors with predictive ML models to create precise irrigation and fertilization maps.
expectations: 15-20% increase in yield, 25% reduction in water and fertilizer usage, and early warning systems for pest infestations.

name: Logistics
description: AI-driven route optimization and automated sorting systems.
problem: Manual sorting errors and inefficient last-mile route planning increase delivery times and operational costs in a competitive market.
how_it_works: Custom CV sorting rigs and multi-agent reinforcement learning for dynamic route planning that adapts to real-time traffic and weather.
expectations: 20% reduction in delivery times, 15% reduction in fuel costs, and 99%+ sorting accuracy.

name: Real Estate & Retail
description: Privacy-first foot traffic analytics and occupancy intelligence.
problem: Lack of granular data on customer behavior in physical spaces leads to suboptimal staffing and lease pricing compared to e-commerce.
how_it_works: Edge-based computer vision systems that track anonymous dwell times and pathing patterns without storing biometric data.
expectations: 12% increase in sales conversion through better layout, 20% improvement in staffing efficiency, and optimized lease valuations.

name: Energy
description: Smart grid balancing and renewable energy forecasting.
problem: The volatility of renewable energy sources makes grid balancing difficult, leading to waste and potential instability during peak hours.
how_it_works: Predictive models for solar/wind production coupled with RL agents that optimize energy storage and distribution in real-time.
expectations: 15% reduction in energy waste, 99.99% grid stability, and significantly lower reliance on non-renewable peak-shaving plants.

name: Warehousing
description: Automated inventory tracking and space optimization.
problem: Manual inventory audits are slow, error-prone, and often lead to stockouts or overstocking of critical components.
how_it_works: Autonomous drone-based inventory counts and AI-driven slotting optimization that reorganizes the warehouse for maximum picking efficiency.
expectations: 99.9% inventory accuracy, 30% increase in picking speed, and 15% better space utilization.
